positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central focus is a majestic, stylized glowing fox sitting amidst oversized, ethereal mushrooms and delicate ferns. Use a bold, clean silhouette style with strong, neon accent colors (electric blue, lime green, deep purple) contrasting against a deep midnight blue background. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a high-quality chest print on apparel.
